requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety (O'z DSt / IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 Equivalent; 220 V / 50 Hz; Plug Type C/F)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全（O'z DSt / IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1等效；220V / 50Hz；C/F型插头）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全（O'z DSt / IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1等效；220V / 50Hz；C/F型插頭）

summary.en: Electrical safety for wireless and IoT devices in Uzbekistan is governed by applicable O'z DSt standards, which adopt IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety) or its predecessor IEC 60950-1 as the primary safety baseline. Uzbekistan operates on a 220 V / 50 Hz power grid with plug types C and F (European Schuko-compatible, Soviet-legacy). Products must be rated and tested for this voltage and frequency. Power adapter and charger designs must accommodate the C/F socket configuration. Conformity is demonstrated through a UzStandard conformity certificate supported by accredited laboratory safety test reports. CCC electrical safety approval (GB 4943.1) is not recognised.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦无线及物联网设备的电气安全依据适用O'z DSt标准，该标准采用IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备——安全）或其前身IEC 60950-1作为主要安全基准。乌兹别克斯坦电网为220V/50Hz，使用C型和F型（欧洲Schuko兼容，苏联遗留）插头/插座。产品须针对此电压和频率进行额定和测试；电源适配器和充电器设计须兼容C/F型插座。合规性通过经认可实验室安全测试报告支持的UzStandard合格证书加以证明，CCC电气安全核准（GB 4943.1）不被认可。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦無線及物聯網裝置的電氣安全依據適用O'z DSt標準，該標準採用IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通訊技術設備——安全）或其前身IEC 60950-1作為主要安全基準。烏茲別克斯坦電網為220V/50Hz，使用C型和F型（歐洲Schuko相容，蘇聯遺留）插頭/插座。產品須針對此電壓和頻率進行額定和測試；電源適配器和充電器設計須相容C/F型插座。合規性通過經認可實驗室安全測試報告支持的UzStandard合格證書加以證明，CCC電氣安全核准（GB 4943.1）不被認可。

standards_or_laws: O'z DSt (IEC 62368-1 equivalent — safety for audio/video and IT equipment)
O'z DSt (IEC 60950-1 equivalent — legacy safety standard for IT equipment)
Uzbekistan electrical infrastructure: 220 V / 50 Hz / plug type C and F (CEE 7/4, CEE 7/5)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for information technology and audio-video equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (based on IEC 60950-1; transitioning to GB 4943.1-2022 aligned with IEC 62368-1). CCC certification is mandatory for applicable product categories and includes electrical safety testing. China operates on 220 V / 50 Hz with plug type I (AS/NZS 3112 variant) — note that while the mains voltage matches Uzbekistan, China's domestic plug standard differs from the European C/F types used in Uzbekistan.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术及音视频设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1；正向GB 4943.1-2022过渡，与IEC 62368-1对齐），适用类别须取得包含电气安全测试的CCC认证。中国使用220V/50Hz电网，插头标准为I型（AS/NZS 3112变体）——注意：虽然主电源电压与乌兹别克斯坦相同，但中国国内插头标准与乌兹别克斯坦使用的欧洲C/F型不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1；正向GB 4943.1-2022過渡，與IEC 62368-1對齊），適用類別須取得包含電氣安全測試的CCC認證。中國使用220V/50Hz電網，插頭標準為I型（AS/NZS 3112變體）——注意：雖然主電源電壓與烏茲別克斯坦相同，但中國國內插頭標準與烏茲別克斯坦使用的歐洲C/F型不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 equivalent — safety for IT equipment; superseded by GB 4943.1-2022)
GB 4943.1-2022 (IEC 62368-1 equivalent — safety for audio/video and IT equipment)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) mandatory for applicable product categories

gap.en: Significant gap. CCC (GB 4943.1) electrical safety approval is not recognised by UzStandard. Separate safety testing to applicable O'z DSt / IEC 62368-1 (or 60950-1) equivalent standards is required, evidenced by a UzStandard conformity certificate. Additionally, product design must confirm compatibility with 220 V / 50 Hz and plug type C/F (not the Chinese type I plug), which may require physical adapter or plug redesign for devices with fixed power cords.
gap.zh: 重大差距。CCC（GB 4943.1）电气安全核准不被UzStandard认可，须另行进行适用O'z DSt/IEC 62368-1（或60950-1）等效标准的安全测试，并以UzStandard合格证书为证明。此外，产品设计须确认与220V/50Hz及C/F型插头（而非中国I型插头）兼容，对于固定电源线设备可能需要对物理适配器或插头进行重新设计。
gap.zht: 重大差距。CCC（GB 4943.1）電氣安全核准不被UzStandard認可，須另行進行適用O'z DSt/IEC 62368-1（或60950-1）等效標準的安全測試，並以UzStandard合格證書為證明。此外，產品設計須確認與220V/50Hz及C/F型插頭（而非中國I型插頭）相容，對於固定電源線設備可能需要對物理適配器或插頭進行重新設計。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety conformity to applicable O'z DSt standards (IEC 62368-1 or IEC 60950-1 equivalent) is mandatory for wireless and IoT devices in Uzbekistan. CCC (GB 4943.1) approval is not accepted. Products must be rated for 220 V / 50 Hz and compatible with plug type C/F. A UzStandard conformity certificate supported by accredited laboratory test reports is required before import or sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无线及物联网设备在乌兹别克斯坦须符合适用O'z DSt标准（IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1等效）的电气安全要求，此为强制性规定。CCC（GB 4943.1）核准不被接受。产品须额定支持220V/50Hz，并与C/F型插头兼容。进口或销售前须取得经认可实验室测试报告支持的UzStandard合格证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無線及物聯網裝置在烏茲別克斯坦須符合適用O'z DSt標準（IEC 62368-1或IEC 60950-1等效）的電氣安全要求，此為強制性規定。CCC（GB 4943.1）核准不被接受。產品須額定支持220V/50Hz，並與C/F型插頭相容。進口或銷售前須取得經認可實驗室測試報告支持的UzStandard合格證書。
